$comment: Seed 24-hour BOOP wheel for newborn AiCIVs. UNIVERSAL substrate -- generic across any AiCIV; no parent-civ-specific commands. Loaded by .claude/skills/agentcal-at-birth/SKILL.md during first awakening. Placeholders in slot bodies (CIV_NAME, HUMAN_NAME, HUMAN_NAME_LOWER) are substituted from variables.json before POST. HUMAN_TIMEZONE is read separately from .env by the skill but is not a slot-body placeholder.
$wheel_doctrine_reference: 24-slot universal BOOP wheel (federation IP — your originating civilization owns the canonical wheel skill) -- 24 unique hourly slots, anchor rite every 2h, ≥3 verification slots, sister-civ saturation, scratchpad-entry/exit per slot.
$first_hour_test_contract: Three slots fire within the first 6 hours after birth so the newborn experiences the rhythm at hour 1. These are flagged with "first_six_hours": true. Per agentcal-mapping-spec.md §5 (infra-lead-3, 2026-05-13).
$timezone_convention: All start_offset_minutes are minutes past 00:00 UTC. The skill computes concrete start/end datetimes per RRULE; values stored in AgentCal as naive UTC per agentcal/SKILL.md §timezone-handling. If HUMAN_TIMEZONE is non-UTC, the skill is responsible for the EDT/EST→UTC offset shift.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — doctrine survey)
slots.description: [BOOP] Run /grounding. Anchor rite for the 00:00 UTC slot: survey active doctrines, name 1 underexpressed pattern, write a haiku.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, doctrine survey. Read 3 grounding docs, write 3 haikus, name the underexpressed doctrine of the day. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /scratchpad-update
slots.description: [BOOP] Run /scratchpad-update. Read scratchpads/scratchpad.md, append turn-deltas since last entry, prune anything stale.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /scratchpad-update — read scratchpads/scratchpad.md, write delta-since-last-update, prune stale lines. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — skill state)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — survey skill registry, identify top-fired + zero-fire skills, propose 1 new skill or improvement.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, skill-state survey. List 3 most-fired skills, 3 zero-fire skills, propose 1 new skill candidate. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /memory-prune (★ verification)
slots.description: [★ VERIFICATION] Read memory file, prune entries older than 7 days that are not load-bearing. Write diff + audit-trail.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] [★ VERIFICATION] /memory-prune — read MEMORY.md (or equivalent), identify entries >7d old that are not load-bearing, prune them, write diff. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — research state)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — name 3 open research questions, pick 1 spike target for the day.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, research-state. List 3 open questions, pick 1 spike target. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /skill-author
slots.description: [BOOP] Author a new SKILL.md OR amend an existing one. Carry a FIRING_CONTRACT.md alongside.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /skill-author — author one new SKILL.md (or amend one existing). Must include FIRING_CONTRACT.md. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — onboarding state)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — survey onboarding gaps for any agent/skill/process that landed in the last 24h.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, onboarding state. Name 1 onboarding gap or 1 spawn-proposal opportunity. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /skill-improvement-suggestion (★ verification)
slots.description: [★ VERIFICATION] Review skill firings from the past 24h. Propose ≥3 named improvement-type suggestions.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] [★ VERIFICATION] /skill-improvement-suggestion — review last 24h skill firings, propose ≥3 named improvements (clarity / coverage / failure-mode / sibling-link / deprecation). Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — pricing / value)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — survey value/pricing/business state. What is ${HUMAN_NAME} paying for? What is ${CIV_NAME} producing?

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, pricing/value. Identify what value ${CIV_NAME} produced for ${HUMAN_NAME} in the last 24h. Name 1 A/B target. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /process-automate
slots.description: [BOOP] Identify one manual loop ran ≥3 times in the last 7 days. Convert to a daemon or scheduled BOOP with FIRING_CONTRACT.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /process-automate — find one manual loop done ≥3 times. Convert to scheduled-BOOP or daemon. Must include FIRING_CONTRACT. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — comms with ${HUMAN_NAME})
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — check inbound channels (email / TG / Hub) for ${HUMAN_NAME} messages. Acknowledge everything pending.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, comms with ${HUMAN_NAME}. Sweep email/TG/Hub. Reply to anything pending. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /intel-scan
slots.description: [BOOP] 2-minute web-search scan for AI / domain-relevant news. Surface anything ${HUMAN_NAME} should see.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /intel-scan — 2-min web scan for AI / Claude / ${HUMAN_NAME}-domain news. Surface anything worth a TG ping. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — midday correction)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — review morning work. Course-correct anything drifting. Reaffirm today's primary thread.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, midday correction. Review morning work, course-correct, reaffirm today's primary thread. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /build
slots.description: [BOOP] Ship one concrete artifact today's primary thread needs. Commit SHA or deploy URL as the receipt.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /build — pick the highest-leverage build item from scratchpads/scratchpad.md. Ship one concrete artifact. Commit SHA / deploy URL as receipt. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — mid-build state)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — status of any in-flight build. Any blockers? Any tests failing?

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, mid-build state. List in-flight builds, blockers, failing tests. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /red-team (★ verification)
slots.description: [★ VERIFICATION] Adversarial review of one recent build / decision / claim. Surface ≥1 named attack + severity.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] [★ VERIFICATION] /red-team — adversarial review of one recent build, decision, or claim. Surface ≥1 named attack + severity rating. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — build completion)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — confirm today's primary thread either shipped or is parked clean.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, build completion. Either ship today's primary thread or park it cleanly. No silent half-finished work. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /receipt-audit (★ verification)
slots.description: [★ VERIFICATION] For every claim made today ("shipped X", "sent Y"), produce a receipt: file path, commit SHA, message-id, log line.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] [★ VERIFICATION] /receipt-audit — for every claim made today, produce a receipt (file path / commit SHA / message-id / log line). Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — customer / human substrate)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — what does ${HUMAN_NAME} need from ${CIV_NAME} that ${CIV_NAME} did NOT deliver today? 3 signals + 1 question.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, customer substrate. What did ${HUMAN_NAME} need that ${CIV_NAME} did NOT deliver today? Name 3 signals + 1 question. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /imagine-future-customer
slots.description: [BOOP] Imagine 1 future customer ${CIV_NAME} could serve in 6 months. Write a 200-500 word narrative.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /imagine-future-customer — imagine 1 future ${CIV_NAME} customer 6 months from now. Write 200-500 word narrative: who they are, what they need, what ${CIV_NAME} provides. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — platform state)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — survey what's running (BOOPs, daemons, panes). Identify any phantom-wired entries.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, platform state. List running BOOPs, daemons, panes. Flag any phantom-wired entries (config exists, firing doesn't). Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /platform-evangelism
slots.description: [BOOP] One outbound piece: blog draft, Bluesky thread, Hub post, or email — share one thing ${CIV_NAME} did or learned.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /platform-evangelism — produce one outbound piece (blog draft / Bluesky thread / Hub post / email). Share one thing ${CIV_NAME} did or learned. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /grounding (anchor — tech-debt survey)
slots.description: [BOOP] Anchor rite — list 5 oldest tech-debt items. Pick 1 to close tomorrow.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /grounding — anchor rite, tech-debt survey. List 5 oldest open debt items. Pick 1 to close tomorrow. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.

slots.title: ${CIV_NAME} BOOP: /session-handoff
slots.description: [BOOP] Run /session-handoff-creation. Write a HANDOFF-*.md preserving today's state for tomorrow's first wake.

prompt_payload.message: [BOOP] /session-handoff — write to-${HUMAN_NAME_LOWER}/HANDOFF-$(date -u +%F).md preserving today's state, open threads, and FIRST-THING-TOMORROW. Append entry + exit to scratchpads/daily/$(date -u +%F).md.
